editorialBaseline::role=admin::stored=cr.formSubheadline: Your voucher code arrives by SMS after verification.
editorialBaseline::role=admin::stored=cr.storyText:
We are celebrating our new rewards programme by giving away 2,000 vouchers to Singapore households.

Sign up, verify your mobile number, and your voucher code arrives within minutes.
editorialBaseline::role=admin::stored=cr.storyEmphasis: S$10, yours in under a minute.
editorialBaseline::role=admin::stored=cr.regulatoryFooter: Redeem (a service of MKTR PTE. LTD., UEN: 202507548M) operates this referral platform.
